headline: Q1: Pooled loss -$8,829 (3,495 trades, 319k shares, -2.74c/share) is ENTIRELY transaction costs: fees $5,367 (1.68c/sh) + 1c slip $3,511 (1.10c/sh) + half-spread ~$1,588 (0.50c/sh) vs POSITIVE gross selection at mid +$1,758 (+0.55c/sh). At ask fills: -$5,239; at mid: -$3,652 (mid = ask-0.5c assumption). q_sharewtd .5353 vs fill .5458.

Q2: NO unconditional 5c price bucket clears q*(p) at 95%. Best: 45-50c +3.37c/sh (n=342, block-boot p_le0=.169, dedup q .521) and 65-70c +1.99c (n=379). 50-53c is significantly NEGATIVE: pooled n=436 q=.4656 vs q*=.5282, EV -6.26c, boot CI [-12.1,-1.0], p(mean>=0)=.0115; reversal-family 50-53c: n=116, q=.388, -13.9c, CI [-28.2,-0.04]. Live v3 corroboration: the 8 impulse50 fills that impulse_v2's f_full<=0 rule skipped went 2/8 = -28c/sh.
Q3: no side asymmetry at matched price (MH z=1.44 pooled; at 48-52c down is better, z=-1.0, n.s.). Interval up-rate .499 (n=1,014).
Q4: cheapness is NOT the whole edge. q rises with p (.416 <45c -> .645 >60c); EV(p) non-monotone; the market is roughly calibrated except the 50-60c adverse-selection hole (q

Q5: entry drift is hugely informative BEYOND price (fav-vs-adv stratified z=4.08 momentum, 3.33 pooled). Exploitable corner: buy the DRIFT side when lead >=4bps and ask+slip in [0.60,0.65): n=71 dedup intervals, q=.817, q*=.644, EV +14.0c/sh, block-boot CI [+6.0,+22.2], p=.0005 (8-cell scan; x8 Bonferroni ~.004). Unbanded (any price): n=85, +6.9c, CI [-1.8,+15.6], p=.06. Candle continuation for >=4bps@60s stable across eras (.775/.764/.777). PM snapshots price the drift side FAIRLY on average (~.72-.78) -> edge is stale-ask capture, ~15-20 fills/day, execution-model-dependent.
SUMMARY.multiplicity: ~60 comparisons run in this autopsy: 13 buckets x 6 calibration views, 8-cell drift scan, ~10 followup cells. Headline p-values quoted raw; drift cell survives x8 and remains <0.05 at x40.
SUMMARY.era_caveat: Momentum-family evidence is Jul 7-10 only (engines retired). Drift-cell positive all 4 days (24/32,14/17,12/13,8/9). v3-era live sample (n=207) still too small for bucket-level conclusions.
SUMMARY.settlement: 71/71 drift-band rule fills settled by Polymarket (68) / corrected (2) / 1 provisional feed - not a proxy artifact.
